meta.title: Producktive — Websites & Digital Products | Gdańsk
meta.description: I build modern websites, landing pages and blogs for small businesses. Fast, secure and SEO-optimized. Gdańsk and surrounding areas.
meta.ogTitle: Producktive — Digital Solutions for Your Business
meta.ogDescription: Professional websites and digital products from an experienced developer. First consultation is free.

hero.subtitle: For years I built systems for large corporations. Now I help {highlight} — delivering the same quality, processes and approach without corporate prices and anonymity.

services.title: Comprehensive
services.subtitle: From a simple business card website to an advanced digital product — I treat every project as my own business.
services.customTitle: Don't see what you're looking for?
services.customDesc: Every project is different. Describe your idea and I'll provide a custom quote.

website.title: Business Website
website.desc: Your company deserves a website that not only looks great but loads blazingly fast. Fast, mobile-first, SEO and GEO-optimized — search results in Google and optimization for AI-powered search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, etc.)

landing.title: Landing Page
landing.desc: One page, one goal — maximum conversion. Perfect for ad campaigns, product launches and lead generation.

blog.title: Blog & Content
blog.desc: Create content that positions your company as an expert. A CMS panel tailored for non-technical users.

shop.title: Online Store
shop.desc: Sell 24/7 without geographical limits. Stripe payments, product management, admin panel — no WooCommerce.

saas.title: Digital Product / SaaS
saas.desc: MVP of your idea in record time. Authentication, database, user dashboard — ready.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.desc: Design delivered in collaboration with experienced designers and UX experts. Wireframes, design system, prototype for user testing.

portfolio.title: Websites that
portfolio.subtitle: Every project solves a real client problem. No templates. Code written from scratch.
portfolio.ctaDesc: Looking for someone to build you a website with corporate quality at an accessible price? Let's talk about your project.

miralive.title: Miralive — Insurance Agency
miralive.desc: A modern business card website for an insurance agency from Włocławek. The priority was personal brand credibility and a fast, mobile-first site optimized for SEO and GEO — Google search results and optimization for AI-powered search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, etc.)
miralive.label: Client · Live
miralive.result3: Clean layout with multiple CTAs — call-to-action buttons

neksus.title: Neksus — Computer Service
neksus.desc: Digital transformation of a local business. From an outdated 2012 website to a modern business card with SEO, dark mode and a blog.
neksus.label: Client · Live

producktive.title: Producktive.pl — "Nice" to have you here :)
producktive.desc: My service website, built from scratch as a quality benchmark. Contact form with notifications, PWA (progressive web app working offline), multi-language translations and Lighthouse 95+ performance score.
producktive.label: Personal project

zenbarber.title: ZenBarber — Hair Salon
zenbarber.desc: Concept project for a local salon. Online booking, work gallery, Google reviews.
zenbarber.label: Concept project

about.title: A corporate developer
about.paragraph1: Hi, I'm the creator of {brand}. For several years I built web systems in large corporations — dashboards for tens of thousands of users, B2B portals, applications used daily.
about.paragraph2: I learned one important thing there: {highlight}. I decided to change that.
about.paragraph2Highlight: small businesses need the same quality as corporations, but don't have access to such resources
about.paragraph3: Producktive is not an agency. It's {highlight} — I personally handle your project from the first conversation to deployment. No passing tasks between juniors. No forgotten arrangements.
about.paragraph4: I value transparency. I don't offer everything — I offer what I'm good at. I use a modern tech stack because I believe smaller businesses deserve the same quality as the biggest players.

deadline.title: On-time delivery
deadline.desc: Deadlines are contracts. I work with buffers — I deliver on time.

quality.title: Code quality
quality.desc: The code I write must be expandable 2 years from now.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.desc: I'm not just an executor. I speak up when something doesn't make sense.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: You know what I'm doing and how long it takes. No surprises.

about.locationDesc: Let's meet for a coffee and talk about your project.

process.title: Transparent process from idea
process.subtitle: I know that entrusting a project to someone requires trust. That's why every step is planned, clear and under your control.

consultation.title: Free consultation (15 min)
consultation.desc: Tell me about your project. I'll get to know your goals, target audience and expectations. Zero obligations — just a concrete conversation.
consultation.bullet1: Analysis of needs and business goals

proposal.title: Proposal and quote
proposal.desc: Within 48h you receive a detailed offer: scope of work, timeline, cost. No hidden fees.

design.title: Design and approval
design.desc: I show visualizations and mockups before writing any code. Your approval = full control over the result.

development.title: Development and testing
development.desc: I code, test on various devices and browsers. I regularly inform you about progress.

launch.title: Launch and support
launch.desc: I launch the project on your domain. For 30 days after launch I'm available for fixes and questions.
launch.bullet3: 30 days of free support after launch

contact.title: Have a project?
contact.subtitle: The first 15-min consultation is free and non-binding. I respond within 24 hours.

form.name: Full name
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe what your company does and what you need. The more details, the more accurate the quote.
form.privacy: Your data is safe. I don't share it with third parties.
form.attachmentHint: optional · PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC/DOCX · max 5 MB
form.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size: 5 MB
form.fileTypeError: Unsupported format. Allowed: PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, DOCX

validation.messageMin: Please describe your project in at least 20 characters

success.title: Message sent!
success.desc: I'll get back to you within 24 hours. Check your spam folder too — sometimes messages end up there.

contact.serverError: Something went wrong. Write directly to kontakt{'@'}producktive.pl

calendar.title: Prefer to schedule a call right away?
calendar.desc: Choose a free slot in the calendar — free 15-min consultation. Zero obligations.
calendar.note: Confirmation and reminder will be sent automatically to your email

guarantee.title: Satisfaction guarantee
guarantee.desc: If you're not satisfied with the project at the design stage, {highlight} I care about your recommendation, not just completing the order.
guarantee.highlight: I return the deposit for that stage.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Business website: 7–14 days. Online store: 14–21 days.
faq.q2: What do I need to prepare?
faq.a2: Text + logo (optional). I'll handle the rest.
faq.q3: Can I edit it myself afterwards?
faq.a3: Yes. You get CMS training and code access.

community.title: One for all,
community.subtitle: Every Producktive client can join "One-4-All" — a network of entrepreneurs who support each other — with priority service, preferential rates, and collaborations beyond standard market norms.
community.networkTitle: What does the network give you?
community.benefit1Desc: Producktive clients serve each other ahead of the queue — faster and with a better approach.
community.benefit2Desc: Special rates and collaboration terms for network members, unavailable to standard clients.
community.benefit3Desc: A flexible framework agreement that allows non-standard collaboration: barters, exchange projects, partnerships.
community.resourcesDesc: Every Producktive client gets access to a knowledge base that drives growth:
community.resource1: PDF Guide: Productivity tools and techniques (80/20, Pomodoro, Deep Work)
community.resource2: Breathing techniques and stress management for entrepreneurs
community.resource3: Patterns and templates for small businesses
community.resource4: Access to an updated knowledge pill database

footer.desc: I build websites and digital products that work for your business. Corporate quality, human approach.

cookie.title: This site uses cookies
cookie.desc: We use cookies to ensure the best experience on our website. By continuing to browse, you agree to their use.

popup.title: Let's talk!
popup.desc: Leave your number – I'll call back within 24h to answer any questions.
popup.consent: I consent to being contacted by phone to discuss collaboration possibilities.
popup.success: Thank you! I'll reach out soon.
popup.privacy: Your data is safe. I don't share it with third parties.

home.subtitle: Websites, digital products and technical knowledge – all in one place.
home.knowledgeDesc: Technical articles, tutorials and educational series. Currently: Pinia from A to Z – a complete Vue state management course.
home.collabDesc: I build modern websites and digital products for small businesses. Check my offer, portfolio and book a free consultation.

knowledge.title: Learn
knowledge.subtitle: Educational series and technical articles – simple, concrete and with a sense of humor.
knowledge.metaDescription: Producktive knowledge base – Vue, Pinia, Nuxt tutorials and more.
